title: Frequently Asked Questions
description: Answers to common ZXPong questions about release status, controls, Solo play, World PVP, Local PVP, coins, and leaderboards.
summary: Quick ZXPong answers for release-ready player support.

sections.heading: FAQ overview
paragraphs: This page collects release-ready answers for the most common ZXPong support questions.
Current App Store details were verified after the public ZXPong release.

faq.question: Is ZXPong live on the App Store?
faq.answer: Yes. ZXPong is live on the App Store and the website download button now points to the public campaign URL.

faq.question: What modes are documented for release?
faq.answer: Solo play and World PVP are documented. Local PVP is retained in code but hidden from the current release-facing menu.

faq.question: Does ZXPong use BarkinMad Coins?
faq.answer: Yes. ZXPong uses the shared ZX Series wallet model and includes coin-based cosmetic progression.

faq.question: What leaderboard should players focus on?
faq.answer: Current central documentation identifies Longest Rally as the ZXPong app-specific leaderboard focus, with shared ZX Series score and coin leaderboards also available through the shared leaderboard model.
